title: Tubi Launches First Native App Inside ChatGPT
summary: Tubi has become the first streaming service to integrate a native app within ChatGPT, allowing users to browse and watch content directly through the AI chatbot. This move signals a new era of AI-driven content discovery and consumption.
body:
Tubi, the popular ad-supported streaming service, has made history by becoming the first streamer to launch a native app within ChatGPT. The integration allows users to search for movies and TV shows, get recommendations, and even start watching content directly through the AI chatbot. This is a significant milestone in the convergence of AI and entertainment.

The move is a game-changer for both Tubi and ChatGPT. For Tubi, it opens up a new channel for content discovery, tapping into the millions of users who interact with ChatGPT daily. For OpenAI, it sets a precedent for other streaming services and media companies to follow, potentially transforming how users access entertainment through AI platforms. This integration could also drive more engagement and subscriptions for Tubi.

The reaction to this integration has been largely positive, with users praising the convenience and seamless experience. However, questions remain about how this will impact traditional app usage and whether other streaming giants like Netflix and Disney+ will follow suit. As AI continues to permeate various industries, this partnership could be the first of many, reshaping how we consume digital content.
twitterThread:
🚀 Tubi just made history as the first streamer to launch a native app inside ChatGPT.

This changes everything for content discovery. #AI #Entertainment

Here's why this matters:

Millions of ChatGPT users can now browse and watch Tubi content without leaving the chatbot. No app downloads. No switching platforms.

The wild part?

This isn't just a link or a bot. It's a fully integrated app experience. Recommendations, search, playback—all within ChatGPT.

Let that sink in.

If this works, every streaming service will want a piece of the AI chatbot pie. Netflix, Disney+, Hulu—watch this space.

Hot take:

This is the beginning of the end for traditional streaming apps. AI-driven discovery is the future. Adapt or get left behind.
